# Keyboard Tab Switcher for Chrome

Keyboard Tab Switcher is a lightweight, efficient Chrome extension that allows you to seamlessly navigate between your open browser tabs using customizable keyboard shortcuts. Designed for power users and keyboard enthusiasts, this extension eliminates the need to reach for your mouse when managing multiple tabs.

![Extension Popup](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/pSpWh0A5E8oFYVGLIrhHe6/sandbox/f061bXUFhTRC7gMZjNUONu-images_1776601063454_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3RhYi1zd2l0Y2hlci1leHRlbnNpb24vZG9jcy1zdGVwNC1wb3B1cA.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=X4oLMxq-JE8371blxHaJg9ASaaxcy-uFFLn59IxpqZ~vWq~zwNUHpkMUxYASNjtVth3hABURGXF36ekzyZcEzuBVMkaAC2dA67xg5cLGBu7adgTMZFlTf1v6Rz1iqeiX96hH9ow6dY32qIEZiAGDsvKJobUWiDSBGgx0IaxtjY98IrNex29eRHkqls7SDcO--NZHgmqweYGcsXiM0bPwHaj~GqE32u-0U6-kgK~8pRZbYhvnlejDLowPnO4-f~RxIvscj8UUFWHIZHnyLt~sBj3J8TXXsqMUwZQLeLOs8S6dRunf9TXRD~S-iYYg7GotG74HQB~C1ggAlbkhAox2ew__)

## Features

- **Fast Tab Switching**: Instantly move to the next or previous tab in your current window.
- **Fully Customizable**: Configure your own keyboard shortcuts directly through Chrome's native settings.
- **Global Shortcuts Support**: Option to set shortcuts that work even when Chrome is not the active application.
- **Zero Configuration Required**: Works out of the box with sensible default shortcuts.
- **Privacy Focused**: Requires only the `tabs` permission to function. No data is collected or transmitted.

## Default Shortcuts

By default, the extension uses the following keyboard shortcuts:

| Action | Windows / Linux | macOS |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Next Tab** | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `Right Arrow` | `Command` + `Shift` + `Right Arrow` |
| **Previous Tab** | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `Left Arrow` | `Command` + `Shift` + `Left Arrow` |

## Installation Guide

Since this extension is provided as a source package, you will need to install it using Chrome's Developer Mode. Follow these simple steps to get started:

### Step 1: Open Extensions Management

Open your Google Chrome browser and navigate to the extensions management page. You can do this by typing `chrome://extensions/` into your address bar and pressing Enter.

Once on the page, locate the **Developer mode** toggle switch in the top right corner and turn it on.

![Chrome Extensions Page](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/pSpWh0A5E8oFYVGLIrhHe6/sandbox/f061bXUFhTRC7gMZjNUONu-images_1776601063454_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3RhYi1zd2l0Y2hlci1leHRlbnNpb24vZG9jcy1zdGVwMS1leHRlbnNpb25z.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=OvQlsMFlFlX1d8Df0u0nThkHdzpT71IeQIUC5CEKwZZACWjcnZ-B3NtHraIMDRuztte6d3sXC~69-MsWYSt0aSR1jPThyd9nyeabrrqqo~IFtTmeT~9KlivOTvtRhh9nj2h~~B~Hx9gtj9rvUMDxNdkIPByoZb05mRK5fJRT4ah3xAPGMl4ZqOpU-5vmJwk3MmbIWBuMufKD9ZA0XNlThLrXfF1tfEKKuwUQ~DrbR~koEaG9WiafeCZxmk6ZIcJXXQqsyOmxCZT0rAgmlYewWm8xVZumqND6CX7nA~MAfPCEAgqWUJsCrWQ5PSdr~I5yyv3co~6VM33SaAJrfffNHg__)

### Step 2: Load the Extension

After enabling Developer mode, a new menu bar will appear at the top left of the page. Click on the **Load unpacked** button.

This will open a file browser dialog. Navigate to the location where you extracted the `keyboard-tab-switcher` folder, select the folder, and click **Select Folder** (or Open).

![Load Unpacked Dialog](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/pSpWh0A5E8oFYVGLIrhHe6/sandbox/f061bXUFhTRC7gMZjNUONu-images_1776601063454_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3RhYi1zd2l0Y2hlci1leHRlbnNpb24vZG9jcy1zdGVwMi1sb2FkLXVucGFja2Vk.png?_&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=LboEqmmKhLzia4gLLk5~V6Dzp3q4EgMdD~uBHcRnXi-69JRUFaen8DKR5d1dcVF~64730iaHrfLz5pBxjyUDaB3csycMQjBjjgwRDrAj-wxQLMEHrTS5RPLLoYZqWcmn4GaFqtAygSMBLIA5iwl~0ZMzcjPZbKtGtZQm-1dKpmqZF7gbTzO2kyrikK2qIaX72K~wTBJhL7BCTB-apBbAQxy0U-QVLTYHEqmvn0pYZo9i8mjvEzNVGKIqd3OPpQJB1a6JtUNFh06jlXxGICZThwhgUIlU9kfZ7pDNKgwH0W8esIOTc5fhxxdWOHE3g1e7ZYnCAYEfqnMgQcIfYr7XXg__)

### Step 3: Verify Installation

The extension should now appear in your list of installed extensions. You will see the Keyboard Tab Switcher card with its blue icon, version number, and description. The extension is now active and ready to use with the default shortcuts.

![Extension Installed](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/pSpWh0A5E8oFYVGLIrhHe6/sandbox/f061bXUFhTRC7gMZjNUONu-images_1776601063454_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3RhYi1zd2l0Y2hlci1leHRlbnNpb24vZG9jcy1zdGVwMy1leHRlbnNpb24taW5zdGFsbGVk.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=GvO0abkh8r0VaYSeSnkESmihOfEJ8vcVFY-j0eZCZZkNNWxkFL9jKfg7S43tiekXNGxYBCOZfmYPOObOZAng6Zf1tgrf8UvkV3aiNQFuOWfbgjzGCvnEkHNTAaIygeG99YcZsi~GRkKVDo-a-CvzQToyYl2Vz~8l6CCWEuU9bp9DQn0iKfZu6smNQppgEbaJQsIOqkvO2YpHUSSNRySOY24QrJZ104tAEXK22bEdKvncOQUZIIJvUlKNvIx--RtXjZH4jz54XU015obCSJopHcKsdzhNuTh3Nz1F3O4UnDzW2Hp8p9N-zVJmhAmyODBLkgQCB8jPthl8PpjADSDAEA__)

## How to Customize Your Shortcuts

One of the core features of this extension is the ability to define your own keyboard shortcuts. You are not locked into the defaults.

### Accessing the Configuration Page

You can access the shortcut configuration page in two ways:

1. **Via the Extension Popup**: Click the Keyboard Tab Switcher icon in your Chrome toolbar to open the popup menu, then click the **Configure Shortcuts** button.
2. **Direct URL**: Type `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` directly into your Chrome address bar.

### Setting New Shortcuts

On the Chrome extensions shortcuts page, scroll down until you find the **Keyboard Tab Switcher** section.

![Shortcuts Configuration Page](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/pSpWh0A5E8oFYVGLIrhHe6/sandbox/f061bXUFhTRC7gMZjNUONu-images_1776601063454_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3RhYi1zd2l0Y2hlci1leHRlbnNpb24vZG9jcy1zdGVwNS1zaG9ydGN1dHMtcGFnZQ.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=opzfag5ikks~oUPyCcAUKZXlCKgm0-UwRpDbZZVZiMFRkZknTWgQ07lldeI8pFfsZ3Y0KJoENlCldIR279oSauv0tXcipjMUUzbY~sblKPgKD6qcaSLKZwgqqjniDE~isjIaeSp09Ft-tMhJieRYkkpdzNFaXWUXO1IoHzpfQ7-YGdYX0LTNXUA72ckLOv3AyqEbzkJUb4s6pKN2xGocGCUj1p9QFw2GFghWaFB80KHL0wMcuZdPmrQ9UqedGwu3IH0AHMmPoVWtNxts~xxF~qUlrW-jN0BTfUIZ2vM8YWmdoIN-HKK0Am2iRTGOSVqsWXp~NVTHnXXtGxO3DUAwFg__)

Here you will see the two available commands: **Next Tab** and **Previous Tab**.

1. Click on the input field next to the command you want to change (it will currently show the default shortcut or "Not set").
2. Press the new key combination you wish to use on your keyboard. Chrome will automatically record it.
3. (Optional) Use the dropdown menu next to the input field to choose whether the shortcut should work only **In Chrome** or **Global** (works across your entire operating system).

Your new shortcuts are saved automatically and take effect immediately.

## Troubleshooting

If you find that your shortcuts are not working, consider the following:

- **Shortcut Conflicts**: Ensure the key combination you chose is not already being used by another Chrome extension or by your operating system. Chrome will usually warn you if a shortcut is already in use by another extension.
- **Active Window**: The extension switches tabs within the currently active Chrome window. It will not switch to tabs in other open Chrome windows.
- **System Restrictions**: Some operating systems reserve certain key combinations (like `Alt` + `Tab` or `Command` + `Tab`) for system-level task switching. Avoid using these for the extension.

## Technical Details

This extension is built using Manifest V3, the latest standard for Chrome extensions, ensuring better security, privacy, and performance. It utilizes the `chrome.commands` API to register and listen for keyboard events, and the `chrome.tabs` API to query and update the active tab state.

---
*Developed for efficient browsing.*
